title: Vibe Coded in 45 Minutes
hook: From Claude Code prompt to deployed app. 45 minutes.
voiceoverScript: From Claude Code prompt to deployed app. Forty-five minutes. I wanted to build a habit tracker that actually works. So I opened Claude Code and said build me a habit tracker with streaks, daily reminders, and a dashboard. Forty-five minutes later, it was live on Vercel. Full stack. Database. Auth. Mobile responsive. This is vibe coding. You describe what you want, AI builds it, you ship it. No boilerplate. No tutorials. No stack overflow. The fastest way to build an app in twenty twenty-six is to just describe it. Would you try this? Save this for later.

scenes.label: AI Habit Tracker
scenes.text: Full stack app built in 45 minutes with Claude Code.

scenes.label: Vibe Coding Session
scenes.text: Describe → Build → Ship. No boilerplate needed.
